holdings.infoBox: SEEM is an equity ETF with a total of 281 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.35%, Samsung Electronics at 7.36%, SK hynix at 4.48%, Tencent Holdings at 2.76%, and SK Square at 2.01%.

overview.description: The SEI Select Emerging Markets Equity ETF (SEEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in companies from emerging markets. The selection process integrates the advisers proprietary quantitative model with recommendations from one or more sub-advisers. SEEM was launched on Oct 10, 2024 and is issued by SEI.
